description: A logistics officer must ensure all vehicles being redeployed are thoroughly cleaned to prevent the transport of foreign soil, seeds, or contaminants.

nodes.task_description: Review the environmental compliance and agricultural cleaning requirements for all vehicles returning to the home country.

expected_outcome.value: Officer understands the specific cleaning standards that must be met.

nodes.task_description: Schedule all vehicles to go through a designated wash rack facility before being loaded onto transport.

expected_outcome.value: Officer creates a schedule for all vehicles to be cleaned.

nodes.task_description: Track the cleaning and inspection status of each vehicle to ensure 100% compliance before shipment.

expected_outcome.value: Officer maintains an accurate log and ensures no unclean vehicles are shipped.
